ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., sensor, gateway, edge device) */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "device_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last firmware update */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., online, offline, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the firmware package */,
  "package_uri" TEXT /* URI for downloading the firmware package */,
  "package_size" INTEGER /* Size of the firmware package in bytes */,
  "firmware_type" TEXT /* Type of the firmware (e.g., firmware-1, firmware-2) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the firmware package */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the firmware package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_packages_firmware_type FOREIGN KEY ("firmware_type") REFERENCES firmware_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware update */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being updated */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firmware package being applied */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the firmware update (e.g., pending, in_progress, success, failure) */,
  "update_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the start of the firmware update */,
  "update_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the end of the firmware update */,
  "update_result" TEXT /* Result of the firmware update (e.g., success, failure, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_updates_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES firmware_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_updates_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_support_objects" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update support object */,
  "update_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firmware update */,
  "support_value" INTEGER /* Value of the update support object (true or false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_support_objects_update_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_id") REFERENCES firmware_updates ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_firmware_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware version */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_firmware_versions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_create_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware create request */,
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requester */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "firmware_name" TEXT /* Name of the firmware */,
  "firmware_description" TEXT /* Description of the firmware */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_create_requests_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_deployment_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware deployment request */,
  "requester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requester */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device to deploy to */,
  "firmware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firmware to deploy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_deployment_requests_firmware_id FOREIGN KEY ("firmware_id") REFERENCES firmware_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_deployment_requests_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_deployment_requests_requester_id FOREIGN KEY ("requester_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer, tester) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., firmware_creator, firmware_deployer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type (e.g., sensor, gateway, edge device) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the firmware type (e.g., firmware-1, firmware-2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the firmware type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_communication_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication protocol */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the communication protocol (e.g., LWM2M, CoAP, MQTT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_communication_protocols_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware validation */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firmware package */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the firmware validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_validation_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES firmware_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firmware_verification" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware verification */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firmware package */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Status of the firmware verification (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firmware_verification_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES firmware_packages ("package_id")
)
